conflict: Jet's buried criminal youth resurfacing through a bounty that should not exist — someone has ISSP internal records
consequence: Jet confronts a past he believed was erased; the bounty's reactivation through a dead informant's codes points toward someone with deep institutional access and specific interest in Jet
must_land_beats: Jet recognizes Hosuke Takara as his own teenage alias — a name he has never told anyone on the Bebop
Donovan the ISSP desk sergeant reveals the bounty was reactivated using access codes belonging to a dead informant named Daichi Kozuki
Jet walks his old Tharsis streets and sits in the laundromat that was his cargo stash — the physical landscape of who he used to be
Jet's interior recognition that the transitions from criminal to cop to bounty hunter were never as clean as his self-narrative
